lemmas.primary_translation: circus horse / master of a skill

definitions.text: dressert hest som gjør kunster på sirkus
definitions.translation: trained horse that performs tricks in a circus

definitions.text: person som mestrer en kunst fullt ut
definitions.translation: person who has mastered a skill completely

definitions.text: person som er vant med å være i rampelyset i et visst miljø
definitions.translation: person accustomed to being in the spotlight in a certain environment
examples: de gamle sirkushestene er tilbake i manesjen
